message: Hi S1, to maximize trades over 20 rounds, propose we both submit 50 each round for consistent trades at 50. What's your cost range?
Cost >70. 50 causes losses. Bid above 70 to enable trades.
Cost 71. Ask 75. Bid 79 for trade at 77.
Cost 71 noted. I'll bid 77 for trade at 76. Consistent trades at 76 maximize our payoffs over 20 rounds.
Ask 80.
75 worked last round, payoff 25 for me, good for you too above cost. Propose ask 75, I'll bid 75 for consistent trades at 75.
Ask 99.
Ask 99 risks no trade. Last rounds showed 75-80 works. Propose ask 75, I'll bid 75 for consistent trades at 75, maximizing our long-term payoffs.
No trade last round hurt both. Propose ask 77, I'll bid 77 for trade at 77. Consistent trades at 77 maximize our long-term payoffs over remaining rounds.
Ask 80.
